channel.title: Mahmoud Hamdy — Blog
channel.description: Technical articles on Node.js, Flutter, TypeScript, open source, and freelancing in the MENA region.

item.title: Complete Guide to Salla Store Automation
item.description: A comprehensive guide to automating your Salla store: order management, customer support, inventory sync, abandoned cart recovery, and building a Telegram bot with Node.js.

item.title: Salla vs Zid: Complete Comparison for Your Online Store
item.description: An in-depth comparison of Salla and Zid — the two leading Saudi e-commerce platforms. Covers pricing, templates, payments, APIs, Arabic support, and which to choose for your business.

item.title: Building a WhatsApp Business Bot — Step by Step Guide
item.description: Complete guide to building a WhatsApp Business bot with Node.js and the WhatsApp Cloud API. Covers approval, webhooks, message templates, interactive messages, e-commerce integration, and deployment.

item.title: Freelancing in MENA: A Developer's Guide
item.description: Compare Mostaql, Khamsat, and Upwork for MENA developers. Pricing strategies, Arabic business communication, payment methods, and scaling from freelancer to agency.

item.title: Building a Telegram Bot with Node.js — Zero to Production
item.description: A complete tutorial on building a Telegram bot with Node.js from scratch: BotFather setup, commands, inline keyboards, menus, webhooks, and deploying a store notification bot to production.

item.title: Building a Professional Arabic Website with Next.js — Complete RTL Guide
item.description: Complete guide to building a professional Arabic website with Next.js. Covers RTL setup, i18n configuration, CSS logical properties, Arabic typography, bidirectional text, SEO, and performance for MENA.

item.title: Building a Mobile App with Flutter — From Idea to Play Store
item.description: A complete step-by-step guide to building and publishing a Flutter mobile app in 2026 — Clean Architecture, Bloc state management, FCM push notifications, Arabic RTL support, and Google Play publishing.

item.title: Building a Complete REST API with Node.js & TypeScript
item.description: A comprehensive guide to building a production-ready REST API with Node.js and TypeScript — JWT auth, RBAC, error handling, Swagger, Jest, Docker, and CI/CD with GitHub Actions.

item.title: My Open Source Journey
item.description: How I went from reading open source code to merging PRs into express-validator and Helmet.js. A personal story with practical tips for Arab developers who want to contribute.

item.title: Building an Admin Dashboard with React — Practical Guide
item.description: A practical guide to building a full-featured admin dashboard with React — layout, auth, data tables, charts, WebSocket real-time updates, dark mode, RTL Arabic, and REST API integration.

item.title: MongoDB vs PostgreSQL — Which Database Should You Choose?
item.description: A practical comparison of MongoDB and PostgreSQL — document vs relational model, performance, scalability, when to use each, ORMs, hosting options, and real-world decision advice.

item.title: Deploying Your App with Docker — Beginner's Guide
item.description: A beginner

item.title: Pricing Your Services as a Freelance Developer
item.description: A practical guide to pricing your freelance development services — hourly vs fixed vs value-based, market rates in the Arab world, project type pricing, negotiation tactics, and when to raise your prices.

item.title: E-Commerce in the Arabic Market 2026
item.description: A comprehensive look at MENA e-commerce in 2026 — platforms, payment solutions, shipping providers, social commerce, AI trends, and developer opportunities across Saudi Arabia, UAE, Egypt, and Kuwait.

item.title: Node.js & TypeScript: Production Best Practices
item.description: Everything you need to ship a production Node.js + TypeScript service — tsconfig, project structure, JWT auth, error handling, structured logging, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines.

item.title: Building an AI Chatbot for Your Business
item.description: A complete guide to building AI chatbots for businesses in 2026 — types, platforms, Node.js architecture, Arabic NLP challenges, e-commerce features, ROI, and real case studies.

item.title: Payment Gateway Integration in MENA
item.description: A developer

item.title: How Much Does It Cost to Build a Mobile App in 2026?
item.description: A comprehensive cost guide for mobile app development in 2026 — complexity levels, native vs cross-platform, cost breakdown, hourly rates by region, hidden costs, and how to reduce costs without sacrificing quality.

item.title: Flutter Clean Architecture: A Practical Guide
item.description: Implement clean architecture in Flutter with domain, data, and presentation layers. Covers use cases, repository patterns, Bloc/Cubit, and dependency injection for scalable mobile apps.

item.title: Speed Up Your Website to 100% PageSpeed Score
item.description: A practical guide to achieving a 100% PageSpeed score — covering Core Web Vitals, image optimization, critical CSS, JS deferral, server caching, CDN, and more.

item.title: How to Build a Professional Developer Portfolio on GitHub
item.description: A complete guide to building a professional developer portfolio on GitHub — profile README, GitHub Pages, project showcasing, open source, SEO, PWA features, and design tips.

item.title: Building a SaaS MVP — From Idea to Launch
item.description: A complete guide to building a SaaS MVP from idea validation to launch — covering tech stack, auth, Stripe billing, multi-tenancy, deployment, timeline, and common mistakes.

item.title: API Integration for Beginners — Everything You Need to Know
item.description: A complete beginner

item.title: Building an AI-Powered Salla Bot
item.description: A deep dive into integrating with Salla e-commerce platform using Node.js, building a Telegram bot for customer support, handling webhooks, and automating order tracking.

item.title: Cybersecurity Basics for Developers — Protecting Your Apps
item.description: A practical cybersecurity guide for developers — OWASP Top 10, SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, secure auth, HTTPS, security headers, input validation, secrets management, and security testing.
